title: Digital map of intrinsic vulnerability of groundwater in the Segura Hydrographic District (Spain) based on the IV Index
author: Arauzo, Mercedes
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
This digital map pertains to the paper: 
 Arauzo, M., Valladolid, M. & Andries, D.M. (2025) Mapping groundwater vulnerability to nitrate pollution in the Segura Hydrographic District (Spain) by the LU-IV Procedure.  Estudios Geológicos  (in press). 
 Here, we present the raster map of INTRINSIC VULNERABILITY according to the IV Index (IV= I ntrinsic  V ulnerability) across the groundwater bodies of the Segura Hydrographic District. IV Index is applied as the first step of the LU-IV Procedure (Arauzo, 2017; Arauzo et al. 2019, 2022, 2025). 
  Key specifications: 
 Number of bands: 1. 
 Cell size: 25, 25 m. 
 Format: TIFF. 
 Spatial reference: ETRS_1989_UTM_Zone_30 
 To generate the map legend, ensure you import the legend's colour code (leyenda_código de color. Lyr) into ArcGIS using Layer Properties/ Symbology/ Import symbology. 
   
 REFERENCES: 
 Original design, validations and applicability of the LU-IV Procedure (including the IV Index): 
 Arauzo, M. (2017). Vulnerability of groundwater resources to nitrate pollution: A simple and effective procedure for delimiting Nitrate Vulnerable Zones.  Science of the Total Environment , 575: 799-812.  https://doi.org/10.1016/j.scitotenv.2016.09.139  
   
 Improved design of the LU-IV Procedure (including the IV Index): 
 Arauzo, M., García, G., Valladolid, M. (2019). Assessment of the risks of N-loss to groundwater from data on N-balance surplus in Spanish crops: An empirical basis to identify Nitrate Vulnerable Zones.  Science of the Total Environment , 696: 133713.  https://doi.org/10.1016/j.scitotenv.2019.133713  
 Arauzo, M., Valladolid, M., Andries, D.M. (2022). Would delineation of nitrate vulnerable zones be improved by introducing a new parameter representing the risk associated with soil permeability in the Land Use–Intrinsic Vulnerability Procedure?    Science of the Total Environment,  840:   156654.  https://doi.org/10.1016/j.scitotenv.2022.156654  
   
 IV Index (first step of the LU-IV Procedure) applied to different territories: 
 Arauzo, M., Valladolid, M., García, G. (2020). Mapping groundwater vulnerability to nitrate pollution from diffuse sources in the Ebro river basin (N.E. Spain).  Estudios Geológicos , 76(2): e132.  https://doi.org/10.3989/egeol.43868.586  
 Salman, A.A., Arauzo, M., Elnazer. A.A. (2019). Groundwater quality and vulnerability assessment in west Luxor Governorate, Egypt.  Groundwater for Sustainable Development , 8: 271-280.  https://doi.org/10.1016/j.gsd.2018.11.009  
 Arauzo, M., Valladolid, M., Andries, D.M. (2025). Mapping groundwater vulnerability to nitrate pollution in the Segura Hydrographic District (Spain) by the LU-IV Procedure.  Estudios Geológicos  (in press). 
   
 ONE FOLDER INCLUDED: 
 Map of intrinsic vulnerability_IV Index_DEMARCACION SEGURA.zip. It includes the digital map of the intrinsic vulnerability of groundwater in the Segura Hydrographic District   in TIFF format (first step of the LU-IV Procedure), the metadata file, a Summary Diagram of the LU-IV Procedure (including the IV Index in step 1) in JPG format, a README.txt file and the legend's colour code file.
